executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to missing or inaccessible GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml). The GitHub API returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the workflow, indicating the workflow file does not exist in the repository or the authentication token lacks necessary permissions.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository, is not accessible on the specified branch, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is missing from the repository or the authentication token does not have sufficient permissions to access/trigger workflows. The GitHub API documentation URL suggests checking workflow permissions and repository settings.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No automated builds can be triggered until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment processes.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in the repository with proper Maven build configuration.
steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory structure if it doesn't exist
2. Add build.yml workflow file with workflow_dispatch trigger
3. Configure Maven build steps (checkout, setup-java, maven build)
4. Ensure workflow has proper permissions and is committed to the main branch
5. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the authentication token has workflow and actions permissions enabled.
steps: 1. Check token scopes include 'workflow' and 'actions' permissions
2. Verify token has write access to the repository
3. Confirm GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
4. Test workflow dispatch with updated token if needed

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error classification performed on attempt 3. No Maven build logs available due to workflow dispatch failure. Root cause identified as missing workflow configuration file.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. Issue is purely configuration-related.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build automation failure may impact compliance requirements for automated testing and deployment validation. Immediate remediation required.
